heading: Establishment
label: 410ff Establishment

children.text: the undisturbed tide pools providing species diversity unique to the eastern Pacific coast;
the pinnipeds which breed and pup almost exclusively on the Channel islands, including the only breeding colony for northern fur seals south of Alaska;
the presumed burial place of Juan Rod­riquez Cabrillo; and
the archaeological evidence of substantial populations of Native Americans;
